next_place_to_go: Operator Command Center / Merchant Lifecycle Registry / Fulfillment truth surfaces
operator_path_after_payment: Confirm payment verification in merchant lifecycle registry
Open the fulfillment truth item for the paid merchant
Advance fulfillment status from waiting_for_payment to payment_received
Capture before evidence, implement the scoped fix, capture after evidence
Mark completion and then review/referral/case-study readiness

workspaces.name: fulfillment_queue
workspaces.reason: The canonical fulfillment truth item exists for the active merchant and can represent payment_received, execution_status, proof_status, and completion_status.

workspaces.name: active_work_queue
workspaces.reason: Delivery units exist and show the active merchant in waiting_for_payment, but they are not yet a full execution workspace with task controls or evidence capture flow.

workspaces.name: execution_workspace
workspaces.reason: Execution state is visible in truth, but there is no operator control surface for starting and tracking the scoped fix from the same workspace.

workspaces.name: proof_package_workspace
workspaces.reason: The proof package structure exists, but only as dry-run documentation and authority text rather than an operator workspace bound to a paid merchant.

workspaces.name: completion_workflow
workspaces.reason: Completion fields exist, but there is no integrated operator workflow that advances the item through execution, proof, review, and completion from StaffordOS alone.

single_highest_roi_implementation: Build a paid-merchant ShopiFixer fulfillment workspace in StaffordOS that binds the active fulfillment truth item to operator actions for before evidence, scoped fix execution, after evidence, and proof package completion.
